home.title: UX4G Design System
home.subtitle: Government of India's Official Design System
home.tagline: Building consistent, accessible, and inclusive digital services for every citizen

hero.title: Design System for Digital India
hero.description: Production-ready components, patterns, and guidelines for building government digital services that serve all 1.4 billion citizens.

features.title: Built for India
features.subtitle: Features designed for Indian government services

accessibility.title: Accessibility First
accessibility.description: WCAG 2.1 Level AA compliant components ensuring digital services are accessible to all citizens including persons with disabilities.

multilingual.title: 22 Languages Supported
multilingual.description: Complete support for India's 22 scheduled languages with automatic text direction and cultural adaptation.

government.title: Government-Specific
government.description: Pre-built components for Aadhaar, PAN, DigiLocker, and other government services with built-in validation.

frameworks.title: Multi-Framework
frameworks.description: Available for React, Angular, and Web Components. Choose the technology that fits your project.

responsive.title: Mobile-First Design
responsive.description: Responsive components optimized for mobile devices with touch-friendly interfaces for India Mobile.

opensource.title: Open Source
opensource.description: MIT licensed and community-driven. Contribute and help improve digital services for India.

components.title: 73 Production-Ready Components
components.description: Comprehensive library of accessible, government-ready UI components

footer.copyright: © 2026 Government of India. All rights reserved.

errors.pageNotFoundDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist.
errors.serverErrorDescription: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
validation.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number
validation.invalidAadhaar: Please enter a valid 12-digit Aadhaar number
validation.invalidPan: Please enter a valid PAN format (5 letters + 4 digits + 1 letter)
validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordRequirements: Password must contain uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character
